message:
chore: upgrade CI to Zig 0.16.0

build.zig already uses root_module API which works on both 0.15.2
and 0.16.0; full build + tests verified locally on 0.16.0.

files.patch:
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
         with:
-          version: 0.15.2
+          version: 0.16.0
 
       - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
       - run: pnpm build
